titleStmt.title: SII 26.21: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 21. (A.R. No. 21 of 1909.) POṈ-AMARĀVATI, TIRUMAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the Sundararāja-perumāḷ temple.

p.hi: Māṟavarmaṉ Kulaśekaradēva: Year 18, Siṁha-śu. 5, Monday, Uttirāḍam = 1285 A.D., August 6. The nakshatra was Chittirā.

summary.p: The king is described here as Emmaṇḍalamum koṇḍaruḷiya. It seems to record a sale of land (sēnāpati-peruvilai) by the residents of Pūlāṅkuṟichchi of Puṟamalai-nāḍu to the servants of the temple of Aḻagapperumāḷ-viṇṇagaraemperumāṉ of Poṉṉamarāpati, in the same nāḍu.
Cf. Inscriptions (Texts) of the Pudukkottai State, No. 398.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ śrīsvattiśrī malkittikkumel komāṟuparāṉaRead paṉmarāṉa tripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷḷemmaṇṭalamuṅkoṇṭaruḷiya kulaceka
ratevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 8vatu siṁhanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu pañcamiyum tiṅkakaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nāḷ
puṟamalaināṭṭup poṉṉamarāpati Aḻakapperumāḷ viṇṇakara EpperumāṉRead emperumāṉ koyil nampimāṟkum śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷukkum
śrīkāriyañceyvārkaḷukkum ciceṉāpitapRead ceṉāpatipperuvilaiyāka viṟṟukkuṭuttapaṭi Innāṭṭup pūlāṅkuṟicciyūrāyicainta Ūrom yiṟṟaināḷāl vippatukkuyicaintu viṟṟukkuṭutta kuḷaṅkaḷāvatu Innāyiṉār tiruviṭaiyāṭṭa cevūrāṉa Aḻakapperumāḷ nallūr paṟṟil Uḷkaṭaiyāka nāṅkaḷ paṟṟiyaṉubhavittupperu(ru)kiṟa vallampaṉvayalum kaṉṉikuḻivayalum vilaiyāvatākavivaiyiṟṟukkup perunāṉkellaiyāvatu
kiḻpāṟkellaiyāvatu yināyanār tiruviṭaiyāṭṭattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai yināinār tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam marutaṅkuḷapaṟṟukku vaṭakkum melpālkkellai tiruviṭaiyāṭṭattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapālkellai tiruviṭaiyāṭṭattukkut teṟkum yippaṭi yicañcaRead icaintaperunāṉkellai UḷupaṭṭaRead yuḷḷakappaṭṭaṉirnilamum kuḷattukkum meṉokkiya maramum kiṉokkiya kiṇaṟum nattamum toṭṭamum maṟṟuyeṟpeṟpaṭṭaṉavum EmmiliLeft incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.21 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
